title: ocimum moschatum
intro: Ocimum moschatum, also known as the Musk Basil or Clove Basil, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ocimum moschatum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
